verdict.summary: The change correctly removes bearer credentials from curl argv by supplying the Authorization header through curl's stdin-backed header input, while preserving token normalization and fail-closed probe behavior. The new self-test assertions are non-vacuous and cover both standard and Claude-Code-shaped probes. Both workflows now create the filtered secret file atomically with mode 0600, eliminating the prior creation-to-chmod exposure window. No trust checks, routing gates, permissions, or audit controls are weakened.
